name: @borjie/vertical-profiles
description: Universal Vertical Profile Registry (Wave VP-1). In-memory + SQL-shaped registry of every (vertical, region) tuple Mr. Mwikila supports — 75 profile definitions at launch (1 live: mining-tz; 74 reserved across mining/agri/oilgas/fisheries/forestry/manufacturing/tourism/realestate). Adding a new vertical+region = adding a row + a @borjie/vertical-profile-{vertical}-{region} package. Spec: Docs/DESIGN/UNIVERSAL_VERTICAL_PROFILES_SPEC.md.
